en.name: Level 36 — Timeless Airport
en.shortDescription: A vast non-Euclidean airport of 26 terminals with flights to nearly every level; severe time dilation makes every wait feel eternal.
en.atmosphere: Sterile timeless terminals under fluorescent light: endless corridors, shops and gate lounges warped by disorienting geometry.
en.tips: Follow signage carefully through the non-Euclidean areas; empty signs mean dead ends. Ask the Backrooms Travel Agency at check-in for routes.
